issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (DON!! ability), but the effect logic is completely wrong
Condition must check 'HasCardOnBoard' with count ≤4 in hand, not 'Always'
Action should be 'GiveKeyword' with keyword 'CannotBeKOed', not 'Unblockable'. The effect prevents K.O. in battle, not blocking
Duration should be 'Permanent' or 'DuringYourTurn' depending on card design, not 'EndOfBattle'. Protection lasts while condition is met
